content: TASK-007 done (inspector helpers, render/viewer inspector targets, SVG click-to-inspect events, diagnostics target metadata). Next: TASK-008 nested zones/boundaries + dense rendering quality, including selected-element visual highlight, diagnostics-to-diagram focus, overlay conflict collapse/inspector handoff, and TASK-006 responsive re-fit follow-up if it fits the rendering-quality slice. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active.
